name: Bryan Dang's Github Page
tagline: A website to host my projects
body:
### Description
Below you will find links to several of my projects. The blue button on the top will take you to the repositories for my projects that are on Github. Hope you enjoy!

### About Me
My name is Bryan Dang. I'm a Computer Science student that is attending UMD. I am familiar with Object-Oriented programming and have studiied basic Data Structures. I have worked with Java and am currently trying toi learn HTML, CSS, and Javascript.

### Projects
* [Password Cipher](https://github.com/bdang160/PasswordCipher) is a project that will take a user-inputed password and will
encode it using a simple Caesar Cipher.
* [Tic-Tac-Toe](https://github.com/bdang160/Tic-Tac-Toe) is simple recreation of the classic pen and paper game.

### Contact
Here's how you can reach me:
* Email: bdang160@gmail.com
* Cell: (301) 848-0407
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
